narrative: A 17-year veteran AI Engineer at Flipkart, with a strong product company background, ranked 61st for the Senior AI/ML Engineer role. The primary driver was their verified skill depth. They showed strong alignment with the JD, particularly in scikit-learn, Qdrant, and LlamaIndex. However, their location in Gurgaon and potentially being overqualified with 17 years of experience may have impacted their ranking. A limitation is that their notice period is unknown, and minor concerns were flagged regarding their profile credibility.
